description: Provides context for generating quest challenges with The Challenge table. Determines the type of obstacle your PC overcame during their quest.

descriptionTranslations.en: Provides context for generating quest challenges with The Challenge table. Determines the type of obstacle your PC overcame during their quest.

entries.result: A Trap!: Your PC was caught in a trap they narrowly escaped from

resultTranslations.en: A Trap!: Your PC was caught in a trap they narrowly escaped from

entries.result: Epic Fight: Your PC fought a mighty foe, in a large battle, or under other legendary circumstances

resultTranslations.en: Epic Fight: Your PC fought a mighty foe, in a large battle, or under other legendary circumstances

entries.result: Treachery: An ally turned on your PC at the worst time, showing themselves to be in league with the enemy

resultTranslations.en: Treachery: An ally turned on your PC at the worst time, showing themselves to be in league with the enemy

entries.result: Catastrophe: Something went terribly wrong during the quest that almost led to disaster, except for the heroic actions of your PC

resultTranslations.en: Catastrophe: Something went terribly wrong during the quest that almost led to disaster, except for the heroic actions of your PC

entries.result: Puzzler: Your PC solved a puzzle or problem that was instrumental in completing the quest

resultTranslations.en: Puzzler: Your PC solved a puzzle or problem that was instrumental in completing the quest

entries.result: Escape: Your PC took part in a daring escape from the clutches of the enemy, certain doom, or other perilous circumstances

resultTranslations.en: Escape: Your PC took part in a daring escape from the clutches of the enemy, certain doom, or other perilous circumstances

entries.result: Contest of Champions: Your PC competed in and won a contest of some sort that led to the completion of the quest

resultTranslations.en: Contest of Champions: Your PC competed in and won a contest of some sort that led to the completion of the quest

entries.result: That Didn't Go So Well: Your PC experienced a major failure that they were able to recover from

resultTranslations.en: That Didn't Go So Well: Your PC experienced a major failure that they were able to recover from

entries.result: Smooth Talker: Your PC worked hard to forge an important alliance

resultTranslations.en: Smooth Talker: Your PC worked hard to forge an important alliance

entries.result: Danger!: Your PC bravely entered a dangerous place in an effort to complete the Quest

resultTranslations.en: Danger!: Your PC bravely entered a dangerous place in an effort to complete the Quest

entries.result: No Additional Context: Roll Meaning words from The Challenge without additional context from this table

resultTranslations.en: No Additional Context: Roll Meaning words from The Challenge without additional context from this table
